case_title: PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS VS. ANDY VASILOUDIS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY DBA GLADIATOR CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE HORNEFF COHEN--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER DISCHARGED, NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $ NOT STATED SERVED NOV-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY DBA GLADIATOR CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY DBA GLADIATOR CONSTRUCTION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY DBA GLADIATOR CONSTRUCTION HEARING SET FOR OCT-03-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
